result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= date
LINE 12:     AND c.createddate >= DATE '2023-05-02'
                               ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    c.id AS case_id,
    c.ownerid AS final_owner_id,
    c.createddate,
    c.closeddate,
    COUNT(ch.id) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_assignments
  FROM "Case" c
  LEFT JOIN casehistory__c ch
    ON ch.caseid__c = c.id
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate >= DATE '2023-05-02'
    AND c.createddate < DATE '2023-09-02'
  GROUP BY c.id, c.ownerid, c.createddate, c.closeddate
), not_transferred AS (
  SELECT
    case_id,
    final_owner_id AS agent_id,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate - createddate)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM base
  WHERE owner_assignments <= 1
), case_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(*) AS cases_handled
  FROM not_transferred
  GROUP BY agent_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
), avg_handle AS (
  SELECT nt.agent_id, AVG(nt.handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM not_transferred nt
  JOIN case_counts cc ON cc.agent_id = nt.agent_id
  GROUP BY nt.agent_id
)
SELECT agent_id
FROM avg_handle
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    c.id AS case_id,
    c.ownerid AS final_owner_id,
    c.createddate,
    c.closeddate,
    COUNT(ch.id) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_assignments
  FROM "Case" c
  LEFT JOIN casehistory__c ch
    ON ch.caseid__c = c.id
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate >= DATE '2023-05-02'
    AND c.createddate < DATE '2023-09-02'
  GROUP BY c.id, c.ownerid, c.createddate, c.closeddate
), not_transferred AS (
  SELECT
    case_id,
    final_owner_id AS agent_id,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate - createddate)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM base
  WHERE owner_assignments <= 1
), case_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(*) AS cases_handled
  FROM not_transferred
  GROUP BY agent_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
), avg_handle AS (
  SELECT nt.agent_id, AVG(nt.handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM not_transferred nt
  JOIN case_counts cc ON cc.agent_id = nt.agent_id
  GROUP BY nt.agent_id
)
SELECT agent_id
FROM avg_handle
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

  FROM "Case" c
  LEFT JOIN casehistory__c ch
    ON ch.caseid__c = c.id
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate >= DATE '2023-05-02'

args.query:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    c.id AS case_id,
    c.ownerid AS final_owner_id,
    c.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts,
    c.closeddate::timestamp AS closed_ts,
    COUNT(ch.id) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_assignments
  FROM "Case" c
  LEFT JOIN casehistory__c ch
    ON ch.caseid__c = c.id
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2023-05-02'
    AND c.createddate::timestamp < TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02'
  GROUP BY c.id, c.ownerid, c.createddate, c.closeddate
), not_transferred AS (
  SELECT
    case_id,
    final_owner_id AS agent_id,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_ts - created_ts)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM base
  WHERE owner_assignments <= 1
), case_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(*) AS cases_handled
  FROM not_transferred
  GROUP BY agent_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
), avg_handle AS (
  SELECT nt.agent_id, AVG(nt.handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM not_transferred nt
  JOIN case_counts cc ON cc.agent_id = nt.agent_id
  GROUP BY nt.agent_id
)
SELECT agent_id
FROM avg_handle
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    c.id AS case_id,
    c.ownerid AS final_owner_id,
    c.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts,
    c.closeddate::timestamp AS closed_ts,
    COUNT(ch.id) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_assignments
  FROM "Case" c
  LEFT JOIN casehistory__c ch
    ON ch.caseid__c = c.id
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2023-05-02'
    AND c.createddate::timestamp < TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02'
  GROUP BY c.id, c.ownerid, c.createddate, c.closeddate
), not_transferred AS (
  SELECT
    case_id,
    final_owner_id AS agent_id,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_ts - created_ts)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM base
  WHERE owner_assignments <= 1
), case_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(*) AS cases_handled
  FROM not_transferred
  GROUP BY agent_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
), avg_handle AS (
  SELECT nt.agent_id, AVG(nt.handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM not_transferred nt
  JOIN case_counts cc ON cc.agent_id = nt.agent_id
  GROUP BY nt.agent_id
)
SELECT agent_id
FROM avg_handle
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    c.id AS case_id,
    c.ownerid AS final_owner_id,
    c.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts,
    c.closeddate::timestamp AS closed_ts,
    COUNT(ch.id) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_assignments
  FROM "Case" c
  LEFT JOIN casehistory__c ch
    ON ch.caseid__c = c.id
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2023-05-02'
    AND c.createddate::timestamp < TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02'
  GROUP BY c.id, c.ownerid, c.createddate, c.closeddate
), not_transferred AS (
  SELECT
    case_id,
    final_owner_id AS agent_id,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_ts - created_ts)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM base
  WHERE owner_assignments <= 1
)
SELECT
  COUNT(*) AS total_closed_in_window,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE owner_assignments <= 1) AS not_transferred_count
FROM base;

args.query:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    c.id AS case_id,
    c.ownerid AS agent_id,
    c.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts,
    c.closeddate::timestamp AS closed_ts,
    COUNT(ch.id) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_assignments
  FROM "Case" c
  LEFT JOIN casehistory__c ch
    ON ch.caseid__c = c.id
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2023-05-02'
    AND c.createddate::timestamp < TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02'
  GROUP BY c.id, c.ownerid, c.createddate, c.closeddate
), not_transferred AS (
  SELECT
    case_id,
    agent_id,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_ts - created_ts)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM base
  WHERE owner_assignments <= 1
)
SELECT agent_id, COUNT(*) AS cases
FROM not_transferred
GROUP BY agent_id
ORDER BY cases DESC;

  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL

    AND c.createddate::timestamp < TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02'

    case_id,
    agent_id,

SELECT agent_id, COUNT(*) AS cases
FROM not_transferred
